results.rendered_html:
niḥ-√sṛ P. -sarati, (pr.p. Ā. -saramāṇa,  MBh. ), to go out, come forth, depart, withdraw,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. -sārayati, to cause to go out, turn out, expel (abl. with or without bahis),  MBh. ;  R.  &c.;
to conclude, finish,  BhP.

results.rendered_html:
niḥsṛ 1 P.
1 To come forth, slip away from, go out, issue from; bāṇaiḥ kharakārmukaniḥsṛtaiḥ  Rām. ;  Śi. 9. 25. 
2 To depart, set out for;  Ms. 6. 4. 
3 To flow forth, ooze out, exude; yo hemakuṃbhastanāniḥsṛtānāṃ  R. 2. 36. 
— Caus. To turn out, expel, drive away.
